items.final_wording: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.

source.title: Headaches in over 12s: diagnosis and management
source.population: People aged 12 years and over with headache disorders, including migraine.
source.setting: Primary and specialist assessment and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for headache and migraine assessment in people aged 12 years and over; partial for adult-only DHA comparison and not directly validated for UAE pathways outside the DHA source.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.

items.rationale: Supports entered visual aura and headache context for visual disturbance with neurological concern; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Lists sudden visual loss, sudden vision change, flashes or floaters with retinal signs, retinal detachment, acute diplopia, severe eye pain with nausea or vomiting, pain on eye movement, and new pupil defects.

source.title: Guidance for Professional Practice Annex 4: Urgency of referrals table
source.population: People with eye presentations requiring emergency, urgent, or priority referral triage.
source.exclusions: Exact for listed eye red flags and urgency categories; local UAE referral pathways and timing require clinician review.

exact_location.heading: Annex 4 — visual loss and other urgent presentations

source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists sudden visual loss, sudden vision change, flashes or floaters with retinal signs, retinal detachment, acute diplopia, severe eye pain with nausea or vomiting, pain on eye movement, and new pupil defects.

items.rationale: Supports sudden vision change, acute diplopia, pain and urgent ocular presentation context for visual disturbance with neurological concern; no decision is generated.
